Class
Description
AttachedWatcher<T>
Represents a watcher attached to an operator
BaseConverter
BaseConverter interface for encoding and decoding data
BoxRegion
 
ByteConsumer
 
CallerUtils
A utility class to detect caller
ClassUtils
Utilities to work with Java classes
CodeGenerator
 
CodeVerifier
Use this interface to verify if the given totp code is valid (it's safe against timing attacks)
CollectionHelpers
Helper class to aid working with java collections
CollectionObservable<E,C extends Collection<E>>
Represents an observable containing multiple values

ConstructorUtils
Utilities to work with java Constructor class
Dispensers
 
Dummies
A utility class providing "dummy" implementations of java collection api classes.
Ensures
Helper class used to validate conditions
Entry<K,V>
 
FieldUtils
Utilities to work with java Field class
FloatConsumer
 
FloatPredicate
 
FloatSupplier
 
FloatToObject<E>
 
HashingAlgorithm
 
ImmutableByteArrayList
A basic, immutable list-like object which does not make use of the wrapper type to function.
ImmutablePosition
Immutable version of Position When the position is modified, a new Position is created and the original one is left unchanged
ListObservable<E>
Represents an observable containing multiple values
MethodUtils
Utilities to work with java Method class
MinecraftVersion
Represents version in the game.
MutableObservable<T>
Represents on observable with a mutable value who can be changed directly
Observable<T>
Represents a mutable state with listeners
ObservableCompound<T>
 
Observer
Represents a listener in the state system
OptionalFloat
A java optional like wrapper class for float primitive type
Position
Position in 3D space
Region
Represents a region between 2 positions
Rotation
Rotation is 3D space
SecretGenerator
 
SetObservable<E>
Represents an observable containing multiple unique values
SphereRegion
Represents a sphere region.
StringHelpers
A class consisting of string utility methods
TimeProvider
 
Transform
Represents a transform in 3D space, combining position and rotation
Watcher<T>
An observer implementation attaching an action to an observable instance, performing it when its state changes and a heartbeat is triggered
WatcherManager
A reference implementation of WatcherOperator, referencing watchers via an identity hash set.
WatcherOperator
Manages watchers attached to it
WeightSet<E>
A set implementation with weighted keys This class is not thread safe.
